hero.title: Built by builders, for builders
hero.subtitle: We're a small, focused team on a mission to make software development more human.

panel.title: We started because we were frustrated
panel.description: After years of using fragmented tools that didn't talk to each other, we decided to build the platform we always wished existed. Three years later, thousands of teams rely on us daily.

values.title: What we stand for
values.subtitle: Three core values that guide every decision we make.

items.title: Mission first
items.description: We exist to help teams ship better products faster. Everything we build serves that mission.

items.title: Customer obsessed
items.description: We talk to our users every day and build what they actually need, not what we assume they need.

items.title: Move fast
items.description: We ship weekly and iterate based on real feedback. Perfect is the enemy of shipped.
